subcodes.first_line: O ye who have migrated in the path of God! Though freedom and repose be the heart's desire and the comfort of the soul [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهاجرین فی سبیل الله آزادگی و آسودگی هر چند کام دل و راحت جان است
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
